description: Timewear from giordano has an elegant contemporary look and advanced Japanese movements, seamlessly blended with classic, timeless designs. A piece designed for modern life yet remaining true to its heritage and roots.Case diameter: 32 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: 1 YearGold coloured case with crystal encrusted bezelWhite leather strap with a tang claspWhite dial with branding at the 12 hour markThree time displaysScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
